# Reva

> Reinsurance document-intelligence web app: Next.js 16 + React 19 frontend, ASP.NET Core .NET 10 API, deterministic parsing/OCR, optional agentic model assist, source-cited review, reconciliation, Knowledge Hub, and export.

## Docs

- [README](README.md) — product overview and quick start
- [Documentation](docs/index.md) — docs index
- [Architecture](docs/architecture.md) — web app architecture
- [AI pipeline](docs/ai-pipeline.md) — deterministic and optional model-assisted paths
- [Interview cheatsheet](docs/learn/interview-cheatsheet.md) — concise demo narrative
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md) — release history

## Optional

- [Contributing](CONTRIBUTING.md) — development workflow
- [Security](SECURITY.md) — vulnerability reporting
